final:
module t_flip_flop(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire CE,  
    input wire T,  
    output reg Q  
);  
  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (CE) begin  
            if (T)  
                Q <= ~Q;  
        end  
    end  
  
    initial begin  
        Q = 0;  
    end  
endmodule
